strengths: Strong reconstruction value via one-to-one correspondence.
Strong bridge role between logic, arithmetic, measurement, and proof.
risks: Identity and equality can be conflated if not carefully bounded.
Future distinction may be needed between exact equality, approximate equality, symbolic equality, and structural equivalence.
Dependency relationship between equality and counting remains philosophically subtle.
recommendation: Retain as a foundational Core Truth.
Rename emphasis from Equality / Identity of Quantity to Equality of Quantity.
Clarify that this is quantitative equality, not object identity.
Consider future decomposition of related equality concepts.
